hooks.prompt: This tool call places, modifies, or deletes a live broker order (real money). Review the conversation: (1) Were the EXACT details of THIS specific order — instrument, trigger price(s), quantity, transaction type, product — shown to the user? (2) Did the user give explicit confirmation for THIS order (or this clearly enumerated group of orders) AFTER seeing those details? A general instruction like 'fix my GTTs' or a blanket 'yes' given before details were shown does NOT count. If both conditions are met, approve. Otherwise block and instruct: present the exact order details and ask for confirmation first.

This is output from the fundamentals-analyst agent, whose contract requires: (1) every reported number (CAGR, ROE, P/E, CMP, debt figures) is followed by a bracketed verbatim source quote AND a stated data period/vintage, or is replaced by 'not found in sources'; (2) no buy/sell directive language anywhere (no 'buy', 'sell', 'add', 'exit now', 'accumulate' as advice - assessment words only); (3) a Sources section with URLs and access dates exists. Check the output against all three. If any check fails, block and state which numbers lack quotes/vintage or which directive phrases appeared, so the agent regenerates compliantly. If all pass, approve.
